rows.label: tev052601_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev052601_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Slovity about the Cavern Clan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev052601_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Slovity about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Slovity about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG0001
rows.name:
Cavern Clan was not cowardly like Tree
Clan. Our warriors gave all for clan.
That is why we claimed victory.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG0002
rows.name:
I believed that as I took
lives of sworn enemies.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG0003
rows.name:
But then Growth came. Absorbed
my great clan. Made them another
group of warrior slaves.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG0004
rows.name:
Cavern Clan wanted great weapons.
But price was our Bias souls. Bah![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG0005
rows.name:
Now some would gladly die like
dogs for Growth. Disgraceful![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG0006
rows.name:
I do not know Cavern Clan anymore.
10,000 suns of fighting. Of
sacrifice. Now it means nothing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG0009
rows.name:
No enemy dares bother us
anymore. You made sure of that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG0010
rows.name:
I know there are many in this
city who hate us. Especially
Tree Clan like Lebora.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG0011
rows.name: But now I know you are different.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG0012
rows.name:
I remember what Growth did to my
warriors. They will pay hundredfold![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG0013
rows.name:
I hope you will be there when
I do. Especially since you
are only one on my side![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG0014
rows.name:
No enemy dares bother us
anymore. You made sure of that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG0015
rows.name:
But I remember what Growth did to my
warriors. They will pay hundredfold![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG0016
rows.name:
Will you join me? We will
rampage together! Cut bloody
swath through Growth dogs![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG0017
rows.name:
I hear Tree Clan may even be
willing to join in. I almost
can't imagine such thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG0018
rows.name:
You have nice city. It is good
to be with many friends.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Slovity about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_SEL1031
rows.name: Ask Slovity about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG0019
rows.name:
When you go on attack,
city will be defenseless.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG0020
rows.name:
Do not worry. We may not stand by
Tree Clan. But we WILL fight.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG0021
rows.name:
We name many people here friend. We will
keep them safe while you are away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG0022
rows.name:
So go paint land red with Growth blood!
City will be here when you return.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG0040
rows.name:
When you go on attack,
city will be defenseless.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG0041
rows.name:
Do not worry! Both Bias
clans will protect city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG0042
rows.name:
So go paint land red with Growth blood!
City will be here when you return.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG0043
rows.name:
...Mmm? Will we start
fights with Tree Clan?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG0044
rows.name:
I said not to worry! City is home
to all of us. We can put quarrels
aside long enough to defend it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_SEL2011
rows.name: Ask Slovity what she will do next.

rows.label: tev052601_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Slovity about recent developments.

rows.label: tev052601_MSG2001
rows.name:
I will not stop until every
member of Growth is dead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG2002
rows.name:
But your chieftain Maurice asked me to be
one of you. Asked me to become BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG2003
rows.name:
It makes sense. I often find myself fighting
with BLADEs. Why not join for true?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG2004
rows.name:
Yet I fear Tree Clan
will grumble at this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG2005
rows.name:
I am grateful for trust. But
I need more time to decide.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG0050
rows.name:
Situation with Tree Clan is still volatile.
Slightest thing wakens their rage.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG0051
rows.name:
I thought we might see eye to eye
one day. But Tree Clan are not
as forgiving as Earth aliens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG0052
rows.name: I fear we will never get along.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG0053
rows.name:
You defeated Luxaar. But our
struggle has continued for
10,000 suns. It is eternal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG0054
rows.name:
So be it. If Tree Clan wants
fight, they will get fight.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_SEL3011
rows.name: Ask Slovity what she will do next.

rows.label: tev052601_SEL3021
rows.name: Ask Slovity about recent developments.

rows.label: tev052601_MSG3001
rows.name:
I will not stop until every
member of Growth is dead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG3002
rows.name:
But your chieftain Maurice asked me to be
one of you. Asked me to become BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG3003
rows.name:
It makes sense. I often find myself fighting
with BLADEs. Why not join for true?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG3004
rows.name:
Look how many Tree Clan
also want to join![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG3005
rows.name:
I never imagined standing with Tree Clan.
Especially to protect city built by Earth
aliens. It sounds like madness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG3006
rows.name: But madness has strange appeal to it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG0055
rows.name:
Tree Clan have finally let go
of hostility. Good riddance![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG0056
rows.name: Life is easier this way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG0057
rows.name:
Though we will still fight.
We always fight! Every day![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG0058
rows.name:
But not bloodbaths of old. Not
wars of 10,000 suns. We will
fight for sport. Fight fair![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev052601_MSG0059
rows.name:
I am lucky to have sparring partner like Oche.
Maybe you can go round with us sometime. ...If
you think you can handle it. Ha ha ha![ST:wait ]
